name: P90 | 暴风呼啸
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a stormy color scheme. It will be waiting for you at the monorail
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器的部分零件以暴风雨的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 它在轨道上等着你
